children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: If the Secretary provides helium storage, withdrawal, or transportation services to any person, the Secretary shall impose a fee on the person that accurately reflects the economic value of those services.

children.heading: Minimum fees
children.label: b Minimum fees
children.text: The fees charged under subsection (a) shall be not less than the amount required to reimburse the Secretary for the full costs of providing storage, withdrawal, or transportation services, including capital investments in upgrades and maintenance at the Federal Helium System.

children.heading: Schedule of fees
children.label: c Schedule of fees
children.text: Prior to sale or auction under subsection (a), (b), or (c) of , the Secretary shall annually publish a standardized schedule of fees that the Secretary will charge under this section.section 167d of this title

children.heading: Treatment
children.label: d Treatment
children.text: All fees received by the Secretary under this section shall be credited to the Helium Production Fund established under .section 167d(e) of this title
allow any person or qualified bidder to which crude helium is sold or auctioned under to store helium in the Federal Helium Reserve; andsection 167d of this title

children.label: A
children.text: ensures timely delivery of helium auctioned pursuant to ;section 167d(b)(2) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: ensures timely delivery of helium acquired from the Secretary from the Federal Helium Reserve by means other than an auction under , including nonallocated sales; andsection 167d(b)(2) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: provides priority access to the Federal Helium Pipeline for in-kind sales for Federal users.

children.heading: New Pipeline access
children.label: f New Pipeline access
children.text: The Secretary shall consider any applications for access to the Federal Helium Pipeline in a manner consistent with the schedule for phasing out commercial sales and disposition of assets pursuant to .section 167d of this title
